title: Senior Teacher - AIF Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - AIF Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the AIF Holdings Services family as a Senior Teacher in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AIF Holdings Services:
AIF Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF Holdings Services!
